title: [MTR4] Low Effort Keihan 800 series
description: Low effort Keihan 800 series for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort Keihan 800 series
![Banner image for LERT Keihan 800 series, featuring the 2 liveries available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01362080ccf6b9225cda302964fafcb7b3dcd5cd.png)
This resource pack adds the Keihan 800 series for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the Eidan 9000 from the base MTR mod.
## Liveries
- New livery
- Old livery
